title: Unsecured Data Storage
description: The lack of information regarding data classification and protection measures raises concerns about the security of stored data. If sensitive data is not properly encrypted or access-controlled, it could be exposed through data breaches, insider threats, or vulnerabilities in the system.
attack_vector: Data breaches, unauthorized access, insider threats, vulnerabilities in storage systems.
mitigations: Implement data encryption at rest and in transit.
Apply the principle of least privilege to restrict data access.
Regularly assess and update data classification policies.
